query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_numbers,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linkable_via_service,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as linkable_via_customer_name
FROM phone_numbers pn
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.id = pn.serviceExternalId
LEFT JOIN customers c ON LOWER(TRIM(c.name)) = LOWER(TRIM(pn.customerName))
WHERE pn.provider = 'Channel Haus';

LEFT JOIN customers c ON LOWER(TRIM(c.name)) = LOWER(TRIM(pn.customerName))
